info.english_meaning: to create a shape to formulate to create a mental picture
info.hindI_arTa: banAnA AkAra banAnA racanA karanA mana meM rUpAkfti banAnA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: adantaH   rUpasya darSanaM karaRaM vA rUpakriyA  rUpakriyA = rAjamudrAdirUpasya karaRam

upasarga_meanings.meaning: spazwa bolanA samaJAke kahanA nirUpaRa karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'digdantinAM dantaBUmiM sa ca kasmAnnirUpitaH' (vi0 pu0 1166) nirUpito darSitaH
'yad devena vArARasI nAma nagarI rAjaDAnI nirUpitA' (pra0 ca0) nirUpitA vyavasitA nirDAritA
'na ca mahAvane panTA nirUpitaH' (kAda0 120) nirUpito dfzwaH upalabDaH anvizya vilokitaH
'nirUpitA SambareRa sA sUpOdanasADane' (BA0 pu0 10558) nirUpitA niyuktA
'nirUpito bAlaka eva yoginAM SuSrUzaRe' (BA0 pu0 1523) SabdamaryAdayA durApo'rTaH kaverasya vyavahAraM pratyanAdarasya lakzakaH

'astrARyamoGamahimAni nirUpitAni na paspfSurnfharidAsamivAsurARi' (BA0 pu0 11516) nirUpitAni lakzyaM pratyaBimuKIkftAni lakzyaM prati visfzwAni muktAni prAstAni atrApi pUrvavad arTagrahe vyavahAropekzA'nitarasADAraRI
'samAhitErapyanirUpitastataH padaM dfSaH syAH kaTamISa mAdfSAm' (SiSu0 137) anirUpito'dfzwaH
